text: Tax Policy: GST. Indirect tax introduced July 1, 2017. Four slabs: 5%, 12%, 18%, 28% (plus cess on luxury/demerit goods). GST Council decides rates. Subsumed 17 central and state taxes. FY24 collection: ₹20.18 lakh crore. Highest monthly: ₹2.10 lakh crore (April 2024).

Tax Policy: Income Tax. Direct tax. New regime (Budget 2025): No tax up to ₹12 lakh income. Old and New regime options. ₹19.58 lakh crore direct tax collection FY24. 8.18 crore ITR filers FY24. Standard deduction ₹75,000 in new regime.

Tax Policy: Corporate Tax. New manufacturing companies: 15% (from Oct 2019). Existing companies: 22% (without exemptions). Effective rate among lowest in Asia. MAT: 15%. Surcharge based on income. ₹9.11 lakh crore corporate tax collection FY24.

Tax Policy: Customs Duty. Import tariffs ranging from 0% to 150%. Basic Customs Duty + Social Welfare Surcharge. Electronics: 0-20%. Automobiles: 60-150%. Agricultural goods protected. FY24 collection: ₹2.33 lakh crore. Phased reduction under FTAs.

Tax Policy: Securities Transaction Tax (STT). Levied on stock exchange transactions. Equity delivery: 0.1% on buy and sell. F&O: 0.0125% to 0.1%. Increased for F&O in Budget 2024. FY24 STT collection: ₹34,000 crore. Replaced long-term capital gains tax briefly.

Tax Policy: Property Tax. Levied by municipal bodies. Based on property area, location, usage. Rates: 0.5%-2% of property value. Major revenue source for urban local bodies. Digital payment systems introduced. SWAMITVA scheme mapping rural properties.
